calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt, via Zoom, for Ezekiel-Maurice Booker, Petitioner.

The court points to the fact that the settlor's two grandchildren did not receive notice regarding removal of gifts as shown in the 2011 amendment. Mr. Schmidt offers oral testimony regarding the preceding and advises that he is willing to serve the grandchildren, if required by the court. The court offers its position and advises that it will not require notice and that there are no appearances to object.

The Petition for Instructions is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
